CREATE TABLE urls (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url_value URL);
SELECT * FROM urls WHERE url_value = url 'https://www.monetdb.org/Home';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM urls WHERE url_value LIKE url 'http://%';
CREATE TABLE metadata (url_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls(id));
INSERT INTO metadata VALUES (1, 'Official MonetDB homepage');
SELECT u.id, u.url_value, m.description FROM urls u JOIN metadata m ON u.id = m.url_id WHERE u.url_value = url 'http://example.com';
SELECT (SELECT url_value FROM urls WHERE id = 3) AS ftp_url, (SELECT description FROM metadata WHERE url_id = 3) AS ftp_description;
SELECT url 'https://www.example.com/path?query=1' AS valid_url, url 'invalid-url' AS invalid_url WHERE valid_url IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE other_urls (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url_string VARCHAR(255));
SELECT u.url_value, o.url_string FROM urls u JOIN other_urls o ON u.id = o.id WHERE u.url_value IS NOT NULL AND u.url_value <> url 'http://invalid.url';
